title: pteris pachysora
intro: Pteris pachysora is a type of fern, specifically a species of the genus Pteris, commonly known as the large-leaved bracken fern. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pteris pachysora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
